Sensitivity.description: Data sensitivity, ordered least to most restrictive (see ``SENSITIVITY_ORDER``).
Sensitivity.title: Sensitivity

WorkspaceKind.description: What a workspace is for; ``EXTERNAL`` is reserved for federated/imported context.
WorkspaceKind.title: WorkspaceKind

description:
A personal or shared context boundary; every artifact is scoped to one of these.

``owner_id`` is set for a personal workspace (its single owner). ``default_sensitivity``
is the floor stamped on artifacts ingested into the workspace absent a stricter source
ACL.
title: Workspace
